title: Generate error for invalid declarations within generate block

features.name: interface declaration inside generate block
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration nested inside a generate block, which is invalid in Verilog/SystemVerilog

features.name: specparam inside generate block
features.description: Code should include a specparam declaration inside a generate block, which is not allowed

features.name: timeunit inside generate block
features.description: Code should include a timeunit declaration inside a generate block, which is not permitted
